_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of customer mission priorities and capabilities, as related to the integration and adoption of AI solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, translating business priorities into data and AI capability requirements with measurable outcomes.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI DG domain. DG-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-029 (AI, cosine: 0.623), LS-K-011 (LS, cosine: 0.600).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.648). Shared vocabulary: [ai, priorities]. DCWF-only terms [adoption, capabilities, customer, integration, knowledge, mission] vs WIDAI-only terms [aligning, business, capability, data, measurable, objectives] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.897 (P=0.906, R=0.888). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Knowledge of customer mission priorities and capabilities, as related to the int" and "Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, tra" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.669 ≈ STS 0.648 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, priorities] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [ai, priorities]. DCWF-only: [adoption, capabilities, customer, integration, knowledge, mission]. WIDAI-only: [aligning, business, capability, data, measurable, objectives].
